arts.ttl: Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly's controversial red card against Wolves OVERTURNED as FA release 46-word statement and Mikel Arteta condemns trolls who targeted Michael Oliver
arts.sum: The weekend's victory for the Gunners was hugely overshadowed by a refereeing decision that drew widespread criticism, and saw Arsenal reduced to 10 men just before the interval.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta breaks silence on Myles Lewis-Skelly appeal and Michael Oliver abuse
arts.sum: Arsenal were fuming ofter Myles Lewis-Skelly was shown a red card instead of yellow after catching Matt Doherty during Arsenal's 1-0 win over Wolves on Saturday, with the player's three-match ban quickly overturned

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm outcome of Myles Lewis-Skelly red card appeal
arts.sum: The English Football Association (FA) have officially responded to Arsenal's appeal against Myles Lewis-Skelly's red card.

arts.ttl: FA make huge final Myles Lewis-Skelly decision after Arsenal red card appeal
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly will not miss the next three games for Arsenal following his red card against Wolves this weekend, an FA statement has confirmed. As a result, Arteta will have the teenager available for selection in Arsenal's next three games against Manchester City and Leicester City in the Premier League along with the Carabao Cup semi-final second leg away at Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal win appeal over Lewis-Skelly red card
arts.sum: Arsenal wing-back Myles Lewis-Skelly will not serve a three-match suspension after the club's appeal against his red card at Wolves was upheld by the FA.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly learns fate as FA confirm result of Arsenal red card appeal
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly was controversially sent off in Arsenal's slender win against Wolves at the weekend and the FA have confirmed how long he will be banned for after a Gunners appeal

arts.ttl: Arsenal offered £40m striker who Luciano Spalletti said has become a 'complete player' in the box
arts.sum: Arsenal remain in pursuit of attacking reinforcements before the January transfer window closes next week. The Gunners are desperate to sign reinforcements up front, particularly...

arts.ttl: Dream Arsenal striker transfer scenario emerges as bid 'rejected' for Mikel Arteta target
arts.sum: Arsenal target Evan Ferguson is allowed to leave Brighton & Hove Albion this month, it has been reported. With Ferguson now having got the green light to leave Brighton this month, Arsenal can make their move.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Myles Lewis-Skelly red card appeal decision as FA hearing planned
arts.sum: Arsenal have submitted an appeal to the FA challenging the red card received by Myles Lewis-Skelly against Wolves at the weekend. He added: "Well hopefully we don't need to [appeal].

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Girona - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting how Arsenal could line up for their Champions League clash against Girona on Wednesday night.
